ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the size for citation preview widgets. Sizes apply to all popovers (equations, figures, callouts).
ast.target: 选择引用预览小部件的尺寸。尺寸适用于所有弹出窗口（公式、图表、标注）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manually clear the cache, useful if you suspect the cache is out of date
ast.target: 手动清除缓存，如果您怀疑缓存已过时，此功能很有用

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reset all settings to default values
ast.target: 将所有设置重置为默认值

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use Markdown renderer for better render support to those figure files
ast.target: 使用 Markdown 渲染器以获得对这些图表文件更好的渲染支持

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Reset basic and advanced settings to their default values
ast.target: 将基本和高级设置重置为其默认值

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display arrow buttons to reorder settings
ast.target: 显示箭头按钮以重新排列设置

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 使用 Markdown 渲染器的扩展名

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: If two tags are assigned the same number during auto numbering, the original citation will be automatically deleted.
ast.target: 如果在自动编号期间两个标签被分配了相同的数字，原始引用将被自动删除。

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Deletes citations that don't match any equation included in auto-numbering.
ast.target: 删除与自动编号中包含的任何公式都不匹配的引用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid prefix, {}, $ or blank prefix are not allowed
ast.target: 无效前缀，不允许使用 {}、$ 或空白前缀

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid format, you must use only one '#' symbol to represent equation number
ast.target: 无效格式，您必须只使用一个 '#' 符号来表示公式编号

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Only special characters (not brace) are allowed, change not saved
ast.target: 仅允许使用特殊字符（非大括号），更改未保存

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Only special characters (not brace) are allowed in each delimiter, change not saved
ast.target: 每个分隔符中仅允许使用特殊字符（非大括号），更改未保存

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please add a colon (:) to the end of the prefix, change not saved
ast.target: 请在前缀末尾添加冒号 (:)，更改未保存

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 前缀必须以冒号 (:) 结尾

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: 'title:' and 'desc:' are reserved keywords and cannot be used as citation prefixes
ast.target: 'title:' 和 'desc:' 是保留关键字，不能用作引用前缀

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid prefix: {}, $, or blank are not allowed
ast.target: 无效前缀：不允许使用 {}、$ 或空白

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 无效格式：必须包含 '#' 占位符

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Only letters are allowed, change not saved
ast.target: 仅允许使用字母，更改未保存

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Settings have been restored to defaults

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 设置显示已重置为默认值

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Auto number is not supported in reading mode
ast.target: 阅读模式不支持自动编号

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Some error occurred during auto numbering. Turn on debug mode for details.
ast.target: 自动编号期间发生错误。请开启调试模式查看详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cursor is not in a valid equation block
ast.target: 光标不在有效的公式块中

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This figure has no tag. Please manually add a tag to the figure first.
ast.target: 此图片没有标签。请先手动为图片添加标签。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This callout has no tag. Please manually add a tag to the callout first.
ast.target: 此标注没有标签。请先手动为标注添加标签。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Link jump is not supported in reading mode. Use live preview instead.
ast.target: 阅读模式不支持链接跳转。请使用实时预览模式。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Can't locate the line hash for this section, skip rendering
ast.target: 无法定位此部分的行哈希值，跳过渲染

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Citation block not fully matched, skip rendering (open debug mode for more information)
ast.target: 引用块未完全匹配，跳过渲染（开启调试模式获取更多信息）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Keys shown in basic section for concise mode
ast.target: 简洁模式下基础部分显示的键

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Keys shown in advanced section for concise mode
ast.target: 简洁模式下高级部分显示的键

ast.name: desc
ast.target: 在源码模式中启用引用

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Prefix used for citations, e.g. 'eq:' means use `\ref{eq:1.1}` for citation
ast.target: 用于引用的前缀，例如 'eq:' 表示使用 `\\ref{eq:1.1}` 进行引用

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display format for citations, use '#' for equation number
ast.target: 引用的显示格式，使用 '#' 表示公式编号

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Prefix used for figure citations, e.g. 'fig:' means use `\ref{fig:1.1}` for citation
ast.target: 用于图片引用的前缀，例如 'fig:' 表示使用 `\\ref{fig:1.1}` 进行引用

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display format for figure citations, use '#' for figure number
ast.target: 图片引用的显示格式，使用 '#' 表示图片编号

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Displays the full figure or callout content directly inside each autocomplete suggestion. Disable to use compact mode with hover preview instead.
ast.target: 在每个自动完成建议中直接显示完整的图片或标注内容。禁用此选项可使用紧凑模式，通过悬停预览代替。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Delay ms before the preview appears when hovering over a suggestion (compact mode only).
ast.target: 悬停在建议上时预览出现的延迟毫秒数（仅限紧凑模式）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enable continuous  citation format, also render citations in continuous format
ast.target: 启用连续引用格式，同时以连续格式渲染引用

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Range symbol for continuous citations, e.g. '~' for '1~2'
ast.target: 连续引用的范围符号，例如 '~' 用于 '1~2'

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Delimiter for recognition of continuous citations, split by space
ast.target: 用于识别连续引用的分隔符，以空格分隔

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enable using pure footnote style citations to cite equations across files
ast.target: 启用使用纯脚注样式引用跨文件引用公式

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Delimiter for file citations, e.g. '^' for '1^{1.1}'
ast.target: 文件引用的分隔符，例如 '^' 用于 '1^{1.1}'

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Delimiter used for numbering equations, e.g. '.' for '1.1', '-' for '1-1', etc.
ast.target: 用于公式编号的分隔符，例如 '.' 用于 '1.1'，'-' 用于 '1-1' 等。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Use absolute or relative heading level for auto numbering (shared by equations and figures)
ast.target: 自动编号使用绝对或相对标题级别（公式和图片共用）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Maximum depth for equation numbers (e.g., depth of 2 gives '1.1', depth of 3 gives '1.1.1')
ast.target: 公式编号的最大深度（例如，深度为 2 得到 '1.1'，深度为 3 得到 '1.1.1'）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Prefix for equations without any heading level (e.g., 'P1', 'P2', etc.)
ast.target: 没有标题级别的公式的前缀（例如 'P1'、'P2' 等）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Global auto equation numbering prefix for purpose like chapter
ast.target: 用于章节等目的的全局自动公式编号前缀

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enable auto numbering for equations in callouts
ast.target: 为标注中的公式启用自动编号

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When auto-numbering, only update the equations that are already tagged
ast.target: 自动编号时，仅更新已标记的公式

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Delimiter used for numbering figures, e.g. '.' for '1.1', '-' for '1-1', etc.
ast.target: 用于图片编号的分隔符，例如 '.' 用于 '1.1'，'-' 用于 '1-1' 等。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Maximum depth for figure numbers (e.g., depth of 2 gives 'fig:1.1')
ast.target: 图片编号的最大深度（例如，深度为 2 得到 'fig:1.1'）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Prefix for figures without any heading level (e.g., 'F1', 'F2', etc.)
ast.target: 没有标题级别的图片的前缀（例如 'F1'、'F2' 等）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Global prefix for figure auto numbering for figures without any heading level
ast.target: 没有标题级别的图片的全局自动编号前缀

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enable auto numbering for figures in callouts
ast.target: 为标注中的图片启用自动编号

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When auto-numbering, only update the figures that are already tagged
ast.target: 自动编号时，仅更新已标记的图片

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enable auto update citations during auto numbering. Always keep it selected to ensure citations are correctly updated
ast.target: 启用在自动编号期间自动更新引用。请始终选中此项以确保引用被正确更新

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically delete conflicting tag citations during auto numbering.
ast.target: 在自动编号期间自动删除冲突的标签引用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically delete unused tag citations during auto numbering.
ast.target: 在自动编号期间自动删除未使用的标签引用。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Time refresh cache (in ms), for very large document, consider increase this
ast.target: 刷新缓存的时间（毫秒），对于非常大的文档，请考虑增加此值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Size for citation preview widgets (equations, figures, callouts)
ast.target: 引用预览小部件（公式、图表、标注）的尺寸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If enabled, tables inside callouts will be centered within the callout box.
ast.target: 启用后，标注内的表格将在标注框内居中显示。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If disabled, figure title and description will not be rendered in preview.
ast.target: 禁用后，图表标题和描述将不会在预览中渲染。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Render local file name for citations
ast.target: 为引用渲染本地文件名。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Whether to add image captions in PDF export
ast.target: 是否在PDF导出中添加图片标题。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Whether to add image description in PDF export (only works when image captions are rendered)
ast.target: 是否在PDF导出中添加图片描述（仅在图片标题被渲染时有效）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Symbol for box equations in Typst mode (typst is `#box`, `boxed` for typst mate)
ast.target: Typst模式下框定公式的符号（Typst中为`#box`，Typst Mate中为`boxed`）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enables developer debug mode for this plugin
ast.target: 为此插件启用开发者调试模式。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: List of file extensions that should use markdown renderer instead of default image renderer
ast.target: 应使用Markdown渲染器而非默认图像渲染器的文件扩展名列表。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enable citation by inline code block in callout (This feature will never be fully supported, and citations here will not be updated, you may not turn this on unless you have specific needs)
ast.target: 启用在标注中通过内联代码块进行引用（此功能永远不会完全支持，此处的引用也不会更新，除非有特定需求，否则请勿启用）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Time interval to check for newly opened files and refresh the equation panel (in ms)
ast.target: 检查新打开文件并刷新公式面板的时间间隔（毫秒）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Time interval to update the equation panel while editing (in ms)
ast.target: 编辑时更新公式面板的时间间隔（毫秒）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default view type for the equation panel (outline or list)
ast.target: 公式面板的默认视图类型（大纲或列表）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Type of object to preview in the equation panel (equations, figures, or callouts)
ast.target: 公式面板中预览的对象类型（公式、图表或标注）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default value for filter tag only equations
ast.target: 仅筛选带标签公式的默认值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default value for render headings only in outline view
ast.target: 仅在大纲视图中渲染标题的默认值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Default value for filter boxed equations
ast.target: 筛选框定公式的默认值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When enabled, the filter for boxed equations will skip the first line for multi-line equations. Used for compatibility with some specific plugins
ast.target: 启用后，框定公式的筛选器将跳过多行公式的第一行。用于兼容某些特定插件。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: What to copy when select copy in equation widget
ast.target: 在公式小部件中选择复制时复制的内容。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Whether to use a fast math rendering for equations. Fast renderer can significantly speed up the load of equations, but may cause rendering issues at first, this will often be resolved after scrolling
ast.target: 是否对公式使用快速数学渲染。快速渲染器可以显著加快公式的加载速度，但最初可能会导致渲染问题，这通常在滚动后会得到解决。

ast.name: text
ast.source: 💡tip: original pdf export would failed to render citations, please use plugin command `Make markdown copy to export PDF`, this will make a correctly-rendered markdown from current note to export pdf.(superscripts will also be converted to normal superscript grammar)
ast.target: 💡提示：原始PDF导出将无法渲染引用，请使用插件命令`制作Markdown副本以导出PDF`，这将从当前笔记生成一个正确渲染的Markdown以导出PDF。（上标也将转换为正常的上标语法）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose which settings to show in basic or advanced sections. Settings can only appear in one section at a time.
ast.target: 选择要在基本或高级部分显示的设置。设置一次只能出现在一个部分中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This equation does not have a tag. Please enter a tag to cite it:
ast.target: 此公式没有标签。请输入一个标签以便引用它：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 按住 Shift 键并滚动以水平滚动

ast.name: text
ast.source: double-click to jump | ctrl+double-click to open in split
ast.target: 双击跳转 | 按住 Ctrl 键双击在分屏中打开
